title: Vijaya Diagnostics is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Vijaya Diagnostics is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Vijaya Diagnostics in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vijaya Diagnostics:
Vijaya Diagnostics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijaya Diagnostics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
